Fig 4b

library(scran)
library(BiocParallel)
library(BiocSingular)
library(patchwork)
library(batchelor)
library(ggh4x)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
## Loading required package: grid
## ========================================
## ComplexHeatmap version 2.22.0
## Bioconductor page: http://bioconductor.org/packages/ComplexHeatmap/

## complex heatmaps into an interactive Shiny app with zero effort. Have a try!

##   suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(ComplexHeatmap))

library(DESeq2)
## 
## Attaching package: 'DESeq2'
## The following object is masked from 'package:scater':
## 
##     fpkm
library(dplyr)
## 
## Attaching package: 'dplyr'
## The following object is masked from 'package:Biobase':
## 
##     combine
## The following objects are masked from 'package:GenomicRanges':
## 
##     intersect, setdiff, union

## 
##     collapse, desc, intersect, setdiff, slice, union

##     first, intersect, rename, setdiff, setequal, union

## The following objects are masked from 'package:stats':

##     filter, lag
## The following objects are masked from 'package:base':
## 
##     intersect, setdiff, setequal, union
library(stringr)

file <- "/Users/jk/Documents/Lab2/visium/python_analysis/local_401/nmf/ann_finest_level/nfact12/h5ad/pseudobulk_all.h5ad"
pb <- readH5AD(file, X_name = "counts", use_hdf5 = TRUE)
## Warning: The names of these selected obs columns have been modified to match R
## conventions: 'age ' -> 'age.' and '6MWD' -> 'X6MWD'
metadata <- read_excel("/Users/jk/Documents/Lab2/visium/python_analysis/lambda/metadata_batch_effect.xlsx")
metadata <- metadata[!metadata$library_id == '20_17478_A1',]

colData(pb)$seq_batch <-factor(metadata$seq_batch)
colData(pb)$probe_date <- factor(metadata$probe_date)
colData(pb)$probe_group <- factor(metadata$probe_group)
colData(pb)$training_batch <- factor(colData(pb)$training_batch)
colData(pb)$sex <- factor(colData(pb)$sex, levels = c("M","F"))


dds <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(countData = counts(pb), colData = colData(pb), design = ~ cond)
## converting counts to integer mode
dds <- DESeq(dds, test = "LRT", reduced = ~1)
## estimating size factors
## estimating dispersions
## gene-wise dispersion estimates
## mean-dispersion relationship
## final dispersion estimates
## fitting model and testing
## -- replacing outliers and refitting for 232 genes
## -- DESeq argument 'minReplicatesForReplace' = 7 
## -- original counts are preserved in counts(dds)
## estimating dispersions
## fitting model and testing
res <- results(dds)
resOrdered <- res[order(res$padj),]
resOrdered
## log2 fold change (MLE): cond UNC vs CHP 
## LRT p-value: '~ cond' vs '~ 1' 
## DataFrame with 16959 rows and 6 columns
##           baseMean log2FoldChange     lfcSE      stat      pvalue      padj
##          <numeric>      <numeric> <numeric> <numeric>   <numeric> <numeric>
## GADD45G   1513.647      0.3987173  0.243180   26.1166 9.01587e-06 0.0597705
## DIO2       471.196      0.4542443  0.196431   25.2706 1.35539e-05 0.0597705
## IL4R       326.883     -0.0170119  0.234090   24.7001 1.78384e-05 0.0597705
## GOLGA2    1390.646      0.3390526  0.274841   23.3763 3.37084e-05 0.0847091
## ISG15     1051.702     -1.3233954  0.295913   22.1943 5.94320e-05 0.0995684
## ...            ...            ...       ...       ...         ...       ...
## TBL1Y   60.6157120      0.9762010   1.03963  1.602804    0.658754        NA
## TSPY1    0.2088854      1.1699914   2.79296  0.516603    0.915229        NA
## TMSB4Y  29.1485143      0.3057229   1.03936  0.740495    0.863640        NA
## TTTY14  62.5889907      0.8991231   1.17147  3.424141    0.330735        NA
## DAZ2     0.0238162     -0.0184677   3.94426 -1.825483    1.000000        NA
vsd <- vst(dds, blind=FALSE)


pcaData <- plotPCA(vsd, intgroup=c("cond", "sex", "seq_batch", "probe_date", "probe_group", 'outcome_24m'), returnData=TRUE)
## using ntop=500 top features by variance
pcaData$cond <- factor(pcaData$cond, levels = c("IPF","NSIP","CHP","UNC"))
percentVar <- round(100 * attr(pcaData, "percentVar"))

dir_path <- "figs"
if (!dir.exists(dir_path)) {
  dir.create(dir_path)
}

ggsave("figs/pb_all_by_cond_probe_group.pdf",  height = 5, width = 5.5, bg = "transparent")
p1 <- ggplot(pcaData, aes(PC1, PC2)) +
  geom_point(aes(fill = cond, shape = probe_group), size = 3, color = "black", stroke = 0.5) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("1"=21, "2"=22))+
  #geom_text_repel(aes(label=name), size=4, max.overlaps = 50) +
  scale_fill_manual("Diagnosis", values = c('#4c72b0', '#dd8452', '#55a868', '#c44e52')) +
  xlab(paste0("PC1: ", percentVar[1], "% variance")) +
  ylab(paste0("PC2: ", percentVar[2], "% variance")) + 
  coord_fixed() +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    axis.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 14),
    axis.ticks = element_line(colour = "black"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 14),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 14, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.5),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 14, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0),
    plot.margin = unit(c(1, 1, 1, 1), "mm"),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    panel.border = element_rect(colour = "black"),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    legend.margin = margin(t = 0, r = 0, b = 0, l = 0, unit = "mm"),
    legend.key = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.box = "vertical",
    aspect.ratio = 1
  ) +
  guides(
    shape = guide_legend(title = "Probe lot group"),
    fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1, title = "Diagnosis",
                        override.aes = list(shape = 21, colour = "black", 
                                            
                                            fill = c('#4c72b0', '#dd8452', '#55a868', '#c44e52')))
  )

ggsave("figs/pb_all_by_sex.pdf",  height = 5, width = 5.5, bg = "transparent")
p2 <- ggplot(pcaData, aes(PC1, PC2, shape = sex)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  #geom_text_repel(aes(label=name), size=4, max.overlaps = 50) +
  #scale_colour_manual("Diagnosis", values = c('#4c72b0', '#dd8452', '#55a868', '#c44e52')) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("M" = 19, "F" = 22))+ 
  xlab(paste0("PC1: ", percentVar[1], "% variance")) +
  ylab(paste0("PC2: ", percentVar[2], "% variance")) + 
  coord_fixed() +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    axis.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 14),
    axis.ticks = element_line(colour = "black"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 14),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 14, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.5),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 14, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0),
    plot.margin = unit(c(1, 1, 1, 1), "mm"),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    panel.border = element_rect(colour = "black"),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    legend.margin = margin(t = 0, r = 0, b = 0, l = 0, unit = "mm"),
    legend.key = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.box = "vertical",
    aspect.ratio = 1
  ) +
  guides(
    shape = guide_legend(title = "Sex"),
    #color = guide_legend(nrow = 1, title = "Diagnosis")
  )

ggsave("figs/pb_all_by_seq_batch.pdf",  height = 5, width = 5.5, bg = "transparent")
p3 <- ggplot(pcaData, aes(PC1, PC2, shape = seq_batch)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  #geom_text_repel(aes(label=name), size=4, max.overlaps = 50) +
  #scale_colour_manual("Diagnosis", values = c('#4c72b0', '#dd8452', '#55a868', '#c44e52')) +
  #scale_shape_manual(values = c("M" = 19, "F" = 22))+ 
  xlab(paste0("PC1: ", percentVar[1], "% variance")) +
  ylab(paste0("PC2: ", percentVar[2], "% variance")) + 
  coord_fixed() +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    axis.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 14),
    axis.ticks = element_line(colour = "black"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 14),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 14, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.5),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 14, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0),
    plot.margin = unit(c(1, 1, 1, 1), "mm"),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    panel.border = element_rect(colour = "black"),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    legend.margin = margin(t = 0, r = 0, b = 0, l = 0, unit = "mm"),
    legend.key = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.box = "vertical",
    aspect.ratio = 1
  ) +
  guides(
    shape = guide_legend(title = "Seq. batch")
    #color = guide_legend(nrow = 1, title = "Diagnosis")
  )

ggplot(pcaData, aes(PC1, PC2, shape = outcome_24m)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  #geom_text_repel(aes(label=name), size=4, max.overlaps = 50) +
  #scale_colour_manual("Diagnosis", values = c('#4c72b0', '#dd8452', '#55a868', '#c44e52')) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("ALIVE" = 19, "DEAD" = 22, "LTx" = 22))+ 
  xlab(paste0("PC1: ", percentVar[1], "% variance")) +
  ylab(paste0("PC2: ", percentVar[2], "% variance")) + 
  coord_fixed() +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    axis.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 14),
    axis.ticks = element_line(colour = "black"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 14),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 14, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.5),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 14, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0),
    plot.margin = unit(c(1, 1, 1, 1), "mm"),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    panel.border = element_rect(colour = "black"),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    legend.margin = margin(t = 0, r = 0, b = 0, l = 0, unit = "mm"),
    legend.key = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.box = "vertical",
    aspect.ratio = 1
  ) +
  guides(
    shape = guide_legend(title = "Outcome")
    #color = guide_legend(nrow = 1, title = "Diagnosis")
  )

library(cowplot)
## 
## Attaching package: 'cowplot'
## The following object is masked from 'package:patchwork':
## 
##     align_plots
ggsave("figs/combined_plot.pdf", width = 10.5, height = 3.5)
plot_grid(p1, p2, p3, nrow = 1, align = "h",rel_widths = c(1,1,1), greedy = TRUE)

dev.off()
## null device 
##           1
plot(p1)

plot(p2)

plot(p3)
